summary:
The volume of distribution is the major determinant of loading dose because it directly affects the amount of drug needed to achieve a targeted plasma concentration. Clearance influences maintenance dosing but not the initial loading phase.  

\boxed{C}

\boxed{C}. Answer choice: C
